hero_badge: Precision Engineering from India, Trusted Worldwide
hero_desc: We are an ISO 9001:2015 and AS9100D certified manufacturer based in India, building high-quality CNC machined components, press tools, and special purpose machines for Defence, Aerospace, and industrial clients around the world.
about_desc: Sri Satyaritha Engineers (SSR Engineers) is a Hyderabad-based manufacturer working with clients across Defence, Aerospace, Electronics, Communications, Automotive, and Robotics. We deliver precision parts that meet the highest international standards.
about_card1_text: We are an Indian company based in Hyderabad, focused on engineering design and precision component manufacturing. With a strong track record of on-time delivery, we serve clients worldwide with consistent, high-quality work.
about_card2_text: Backed by 25+ years of experience working closely with French companies, we specialize in high-precision components, sub-assemblies, press tools, and special purpose machines.
about_card3_text: Customer trust and intellectual property protection come first. Every project starts with an NDA, so your designs and business data are safe with us from day one.
services_desc: From design to delivery — CAD, CNC machining, press tools, and special purpose machines for Defence, Aerospace, and other demanding industries.
service1_desc: 3D modeling, production drawings with GD&T, bill of materials, assembly tagging, and conversion of paper, PDF, or AutoCAD drawings into full 3D models.
service2_desc: High-quality CNC machined parts for Defence, Aerospace, Communications, and Robotics. We deliver small and medium assemblies with tight tolerances and thorough inspection.
service3_desc: Custom press tools built for mass production of sheet metal and plastic parts, including specialized aluminium extrusion tooling developed for French clients.
service4_desc: Bulk production of precision sheet metal parts using our own press tools — competitive pricing and consistent quality, order after order.
service5_desc: Custom-built pneumatic, hydraulic, and automated machines designed and manufactured to your exact specifications.
service6_desc: Heat treatment, hardening, anodising (clear or coloured), zinc, nickel, cadmium, and chrome plating, plus spray-booth painting for aluminium and steel parts.
domains_desc: Trusted by leading organisations across Defence, Aerospace, Communications, and beyond.
domain1_desc: Precision parts and sub-assemblies for radar systems, control panels, and defence equipment, built to strict tolerance requirements.
domain2_desc: Structural and mechanical parts for aerospace applications, manufactured to AS9100D quality standards.
domain3_desc: CNC machined enclosures, housings, and precision parts for communication systems in both civilian and military use.
domain4_desc: Specialized press tool design and manufacturing for aluminium extrusion — a core strength built through years of work with French industry.
domain5_desc: Precision parts and mechanical sub-assemblies for robotics and industrial automation, engineered for reliability and repeatability.
domain6_desc: Durable, high-precision parts for marine communication and navigation systems, built to perform in tough environments.
why1_desc: Led by engineers with 25 years of hands-on experience delivering high-precision components, press tools, and SPMs for French companies.
why2_desc: We work with trusted micromachining partners to keep costs down without compromising on quality.
why3_desc: Our workshop is equipped with VMC machines (bed sizes up to 1365 mm), CNC lathes, a fitting section, and a Trimos V7 precision measuring instrument.
why4_desc: Reliable schedules and clear communication are central to how we work — and our on-time delivery record proves it.
why5_desc: Independently certified by QRO and UK Certifications for our quality management in Defence, Aerospace, and Communications manufacturing.
why6_desc: We take confidentiality seriously. Every engagement begins with a Non-Disclosure Agreement that protects your designs and business data.
cert_scope_text: Machine Designs (Mechanical) and Manufacturing of Parts as per Drawings. Domains: Defence, Aerospace, Communications, Robotics, Press Tools, Marine Communications.
contact_desc: Have a machining job, design project, or press tool requirement? Send us the details and our team will get back to you quickly with a solution built around your needs.
contact_toast_desc: We'll get back to you shortly.
footer_tagline: An India-based, ISO 9001:2015 and AS9100D certified manufacturer delivering precision components, press tools, and special purpose machines to Defence, Aerospace, and Communications clients worldwide for over 25 years.
footer_copyright: Sri Satyaritha Engineers. All rights reserved.
